Security.rationale: bandit, pip-audit, non-root, optional API key. No SBOM attestation.
key_risks: GitHub Actions not fully pinned in sbom job
recommended_actions: Pin all actions to full SHA

Reliability.rationale: Health probes inferred. No K8s deployment in repo.

Compliance_Evidence_Quality.rationale: SBOM generated but no attestation; sbom job uses tag not SHA.

findings.title: GitHub Actions not fully pinned in sbom job
findings.recommendation: Pin to full SHA like other jobs

top_remediation_priorities: Pin all GitHub Actions to full SHA
Add SBOM attestation for supply chain integrity
Add Kubernetes deployment or document deployment model
Document API key requirement for production
